title: Bromine / Bromide
note: Used in organic bromination and redox chemistry.

title: Iron (III) / Iron (II)
note: Common redox couple in biological and industrial systems.

title: Mercury (II) / Mercury
note: Used in electrochemical cells and sensors.

title: Gold (III) / Gold
note: Highly noble metal with strong oxidising potential.

title: Platinum (II) / Platinum
note: Used in catalytic and electrochemical systems.

title: Hydrogen Peroxide (acidic)
note: Acts as oxidiser in acidic medium.

title: Hydrogen Peroxide (basic)
note: Acts as reducing agent in basic medium.

title: Ozone / Oxygen
note: Used in water purification and oxidation reactions.

title: Aluminium / Aluminium ion
note: Highly reactive metal used in extraction processes.

title: Calcium / Calcium ion
note: Used in metallurgy and reduction processes.

title: Perchlorate / Chloride
note: Very stable but strong oxidiser under conditions.
